titleStmt.title: SII 36.224: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 224. (A.R. No. 224 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: (Vikāri, Siṅgha, śu., 10, Monday, Anuttu (Anusham) = A.D. 1419, September, 31, Monday, Jyēshṭa.)

Damaged and incomplete. Assignment of kāṇi right of the village Niyāyaparipālaṉ-pēṭṭai to the temple of Tiruvallidāyamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Tiruvallidāyam in Ambattūr-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻavaḷanāḍu, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam for a consideration of 180 vāsipaḍā-naṟ-paṇam by four persons holding the kāṇi right of the village. It was stipulated that the tax and other dues to the State shall be paid by the seller of the kāṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṉ mahāmaṇṭalīśvaraṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyār kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ pūrvvapakṣima dakṣiṇa Uttarātipati vīraśrī devarāya mahaārāyaṟkku cellāniṉṟa vikāri samvaṟsara
ttu ciṅkaṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dacamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉuttu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu puḻal koṭṭam Āṉa vikkiṟamacoḻa vaḷaṉāṭṭu Ampattūr nāṭṭu tiruvallitāyattu ṉāyaṉār tiruva
llitāyam Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārattu Imaṇṭalattu Ik koṭṭattu Iṉṉāṭṭu vicaiyālaiya nallūrāṉa nuḷappiyāṟṟu nuḷappiyāṟṟuḻār Irācarāca viḻupparaiyar Uḷḷiṭṭārum meṟpaṭi koṅkarācar Uḷḷi
ṭṭārum meṟpaṭi periyaṉāyaṉār Uḷḷiṭṭārum meṟpaṭi villavarāyārum Ivvaṉaivarom kāṇivilai piṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Eṅka(ṅ)ḷ kāṇiāṉa nuḷappiyāṟṟu maṇañceri Āṉa niyāyaparipāla
ṉ peṭṭai kīḻpāṟkku Ellai pāṭiyil melait tiruvītikku meṟkum mel pāṟ kellai pāṭiyil melait tiruvitikkum meṟkum meṟkum melpaāṟ kellaip paṉaccaik kuḻiyil kīḻaikkālukku meṟkkum teṉpā
ṟ teṉpāṟkellai Āccapirāṉ vaṭapālaicceṟu maṇali vaṭakku taricukku vaṭakkum vaṭapāṟkellai puṉṉaivāyalāṉ kālukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉku Ellaikku Uṭppaṭṭa nañcai nilamum
puṉcai nilamum nattamum nattal maṉaiyum maṉaipaṭappum meṉṉokkiṉa maramu kīḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum kaṉṟumeypāḻum kāṭum piṭaliyum kuḻiyum teṭṭamum nīrum nīroṭukālum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭac cakalaāṟattikkum vilai Āka Emmil Icaintu vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭaṉ naṭakkum vāci
paṭātanaṟ ø 100 8 10 Ippaṇam nūṟṟueṇpatu Ippaṇam nūṟṟueṇpatukkum Ivvūr vilai Āvatu Ākavum Ivvūṟku Eppeṟppaṭṭa kalaṉum Illai kalaṉuḷḷavai toṟṟuppaṭilṉāṅkaḷe kalaṉ tīrttu tarakkaṭavom Ākavum Ivvūr Ivaṟku viṟṟu Oṟṟi Ātitātiṉmaṅkaḷukku maṟṟu Eṟppeṟ
ppaṭṭac cakalaāṟttikaḷukku Urittuāka kaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṇam nūṟṟueṇpatukkum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷccelavolai Āvatu Ākavum Itu Allatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷccelavolai kāṭṭu Eṟṟameṉṟu collappeṟātākavum Ivvūrkku Ellaic cīrmaikaḷile tiruccūla
stāparam paṇṇikkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Ivvūrkku Iṟaiiṟuppum Irācakarattukkum cantirātittavaraikkumṉāṅkaḷe Iṟuttuk koḷḷak kaṭavomākavum Ippiramāṇattukku Olaikkuṟṟam Eḻuttup piḻai vācakap paḻutu vāṭṭueṟṟam Eṉṟu collap peṟātākavum Iccātaṉappaṭikku
Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatu Ippaṇam nūṟṟueṇpatukkum Ivvūr vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷuṟakaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkoṭuttomṉāyaṉār tiruvallitāyammuṭaiyaṉāyaṉārkku cantrādittavaraikkum celvatāka cilācācaṇam paṇṇi
kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku nuḷappiyāṟṟuḻāṉ Irācarāca viḻupparaiyaruḷḷiṭṭārum meṟpaṭi koṅkarāyar Uḷḷiṭṭārum meṟpaṭi periyaṉāyaṉār Uḷḷiṭṭārum meṟpaṭi villavarāyar Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ivva

yāṟṟil Ūravarom tiruvallitāyam
Uṭaiya nāyanāyanāṟkku sarvvamānyam Āka
kkuṭuttom Itukku Akitam coṉṉavaṉ
keṅkaik karaiyil kārampacuvai
koṉṟaṉ pāvattile pokakaṭavaṉ
Digital edition of SII 36.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
